title: When drinking water became a revolution | Mahad Satyagraha
description: A century ago, Ambedkar led a protest in Mahad that turned the right to water into a fight for dignity and equality. When drinking water became an act of resistance, this is the story of the Mahad Satyagraha. 100 years after Mahad, Ambedkar’s fight for equality still resonates across India.
